title: Call: Calculate the profit from a long position in a call...
summary: Calculate the profit from a call option position at expiration.
prompt: Calculate the profit from a long position in a call option if the stock price at expiration is $60, the strike price is $55, and the premium paid is $5.

options.text: Profit = Max(0, Stock Price - Strike Price) - Premium = Max(0, 60 - 55) - 5 = $0

solution: Profit = Max(0, Stock Price - Strike Price) - Premium = Max(0, 60 - 55) - 5 = $0. [[24]]
